title: LE13 1GA, Samworth Brothers Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/GP3548QT/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Samworth Brothers Limited Installation name: Melton Foods Permit number: EPR/GP3548QT/V002  "
